Chronicle (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $64,575,175Details
International Box Office $59,106,615
Worldwide Box Office $123,681,790
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,381,374
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $7,843,835
Total $16,225,209
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In the new century, we record, post and comment on every second of our lives, sharing our every emotion and opinion with the world, no matter how mundane. But for three friends who stumble upon a life-changing discovery, the chronicle of their ordinary lives is about to take an extraordinary turn.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$22,004,098 (34.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 10.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,907 opening theaters/2,908 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $97,025,010

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 3rd, 2012 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: February 2nd, 2012 (Wide) (Bahrain)
February 23rd, 2012 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
March 2nd, 2012 (Wide) (Brazil)
April 13th, 2012 (Wide) (Turkey)
April 19th, 2012 (Wide) (Denmark)
Video Release: May 15th, 2012 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense action and violence, thematic material, some language, sexual content and teen drinking.
(Rating bulletin 2205, 1/11/2012)
Running Time: 106 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Found Footage
Plot point: Addiction, Bullies, Dysfunctional Family, First Love, Psychics, Revenge, Romance
Subgenre: Action Thriller

Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, Davis Entertainment, Dune Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

In the new century, we record, post and comment on every second of our lives, sharing our every emotion and opinion with the world, no matter how mundane. But for three friends who stumble upon a life-changing discovery, the chronicle of their ordinary lives is about to take an extraordinary turn.
